questions: credit card use korar benefit ki?
how does credit card interest work?
credit card ar debit card er difference ki?
answers: A credit card lets you borrow money from the bank up to a set limit to make purchases, with the agreement to pay it back later, usually with interest if not paid in full.
Credit card e tumi bank er taka diye kena kata koro ar pore pay koro. Time moto pay korle interest lage na, but late hole high interest charge hoy.
Credit card benefits include building credit history, earning rewards/cashback, purchase protection, travel benefits, and the ability to make payments even when cash is low.
Credit cards charge interest (APR) on unpaid balances after the grace period. Always try to pay the full balance each month to avoid accumulating expensive interest charges.
